title: CI & CLI release
summary: Superrepo and **compiler** CI move orchestration into **Nox** (aggregate workflows, ASan scoping, release Python deps). Ship **multi-platform CLI** binaries via SeaweedFS/S3 with upload-key and retry fixes, migrate public docs to **Astro**, and refresh **landing/downloads** plus early **language book** pages — no separate v01-cli-release deliverable; release tasks anchor on this workstream only.
